summary: Bubble Tea model for interactive source filter picker overlay with checkbox list, cursor navigation, and state management
side_effects: renders terminal UI with borders and styled text
config_deps: styles: titleStyle, helpDescStyle, selectedCardStyle, sourceTypeBadgeStyle, primaryColor
notes: Part of filtering subsystem (hint). filterOverlayModel is a Bubble Tea sub-model with sources list, selected map, and cursor position. Sends filterOverlayConfirmMsg (with constructed SourceFilter) on enter or filterOverlayCancelMsg on esc. buildFilter() converts selection to SourceFilter (all selected → empty filter meaning match-all).
